Describe the sequence of events involving the motorcycle and the presenter from the moment the vehicle appears until the man speaks.
canonical_answer: At 10s, a motorcycle with an illuminated headlight exits an enclosed trailer; at 12s, a man in a plaid shirt sits on a red motorcycle and adjusts the side mirror; at 14s, a man with spiky brown hair wearing a blue collared shirt stands before an orange trailer and opens his mouth to speak.

question: Has the man with short grey hair begun riding the red motorcycle up the metal ramp into the trailer?
